---
description: "Use when working in this repository. Claude is the primary AI editor; preserve Claude-oriented workflows, conventions, and artifacts unless the user explicitly requests a different approach."
applyTo: "**"
---
# Claude-Primary Collaboration Rules

- Treat Claude-oriented project artifacts as canonical when there is any ambiguity.
- Prefer edits that are compatible with existing `.claude/` workflows and files.
- Do not replace, remove, or rewrite Claude-specific instructions, prompts, or automation unless explicitly requested.
- If introducing new AI-workflow docs or scripts, keep them Claude-first and add Copilot-specific notes only when useful.
- Keep implementation decisions grounded in repository conventions and direct user requests over tool/editor preferences.
